text: The detective-turned-photographer, Henry Reed, couldn't shake the feeling that something was amiss. A hushed conversation between Ronan Guevara and Miles Pritchett caught Henry Reed's attention, Ronan Guevara's and Miles Pritchett's furtive glances adding to the air of mystery. Henry Reed approached a group gathered around Henry Reed's own work, where Henry Reed explained post-processing techniques with practiced ease.
context: This chunk describes Henry Reed's initial observations and growing suspicion at the photography exhibition, focusing on a hushed conversation and his own interaction with attendees.
